title: Not Your Average EVA Brand Stuff
display_title: Not Your Average EVA Brand Stuff
wikitext: []: Not Your Average EVA Brand Stuff             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat May 12, 2018 12:57 pm Based on this article from Anime New Network , the clams in said soup are from Lake Shinji near Matsue, Shimane prefecture. This branding also ties in with some other stuff in the area such as the Shimane Art Museum's EVA Exhibition , and the Matsue Vogel Park penguins being dressed up .

This branding also ties in with some other stuff in the area such as the Shimane Art Museum's EVA Exhibition , and the Matsue Vogel Park penguins being dressed up .
